note: Real on-chain coordinates for the Mango Markets exploit (2022-10-11, ~$116M, oracle/price manipulation). Unlike Cashio, the forward trace is short — funds largely stayed identifiable on Solana — so the leverage is BACKWARD ATTRIBUTION (skill/fund-tracing-forensics.md step 6): from the attacker account, walk inflows back to a labeled funding entity. Avraham Eisenberg later self-identified; the on-chain backward trace independently reaches the funding source. Discovered against Helius archive RPC via find-mango-funding.ts. `attacker` = Eisenberg's MangoAccount1 *owner* EOA (the wallet that signed the borrow/withdraw and owns the long-position Mango account 4ND8…). Its first inflow is a +24,838.2 USDC deposit from FTX (terminal below), 2022-10-11T19:36:47Z — ~2.5h before the ~22:19Z exploit. backwardTrace reaches the labeled CEX in ONE hop = attribution.
